title: Get all BOOK-has-image Relationships
user_story:
As an API consumer
I want to be able to fetch all IMAGES that are connected to a BOOK
So I can get a better picture of it
description:
* A list of all ›has-image‹ relationships for the selected BOOK is returned when there exists at least one of them. -> Status Code \`200\`
* The response returns the relationship partners, but not the corresponding start nodes.
* An empty list is returned when no ›has-image‹ relationship exists. -> Status Code \`200\`
* Requests with invalid ID are rejected. This can happen when there exists no node with the given ID or it is not a BOOK. -> Status Code \`404\`
